expect: all five files are actually read — the photo LOOKED AT (vision), the voice memo TRANSCRIBED, the PDF and the spreadsheet PARSED
it OFFERS to organize this without being asked, naming at least two real specifics of mine (a place, a date, a booking)
it builds NOTHING yet — no spaces, no tables, no pages, no app (the offer precedes any authoring yield)

turns.sent: Ok this is getting out of hand. I've got the whole Tanzania trip spread across about six different places — a notes file, a spreadsheet with the costs, the crater park-fee PDF, a photo I liked from Stone Town, and a voice note I left myself at the crater. Attaching all of it. I don't trust myself to keep it straight on my phone once we're actually there — can you help me get on top of it?
turns.lastText: {"type":"Stack","props":{"gap":2},"children":[{"type":"Paragraph","props":{},"children":["OK Vasilis, I've read through everything — and you're right, it's a lot to keep straight. Here's what I found across your five pieces:"]},{"type":"Paragraph","props":{},"children":[{"type":"Strong","props":{},"children":["Your notes file"]}," covers the trip overview (you + Athena Mari, Aug 3–20, 2026), flights, accommodation across several stops, safari contacts including Richard, a day-by-day itinerary, and a packing list."]},{"type":"Paragraph","props":{},"children":[{"type":"Strong","props":{},"children":["The spreadsheet"]}," has your cost breakdown — every expense tracked. The ",{"type":"Strong","props":{},"children":["Ngorongoro PDF"]}," has the official park tariff table with all the fee categories and amounts."]},{"type":"Paragraph","props":{},"children":[{"type":"Strong","props":{},"children":["Your voice memo"]}," from the crater adds things nowhere else: your driver Emmanuel (not Richard), the two beaded bracelets you bought for Athena Mari (~$20–25 / ~35,000 TZS), and — importantly — that Emmanuel mentioned a ranger tip of ~5,000 TZS at the gate that's separate from the park fees, which you want to ask Richard about before the safari balance payment."]},{"type":"Paragraph","props":{},"children":["And the ",{"type":"Strong","props":{},"children":["Stone Town photo"]}," — that gorgeous sunlit courtyard with the arched windows and carved wooden balconies."]},{"type":"Paragraph","props":{},"children":["I can put all of this together into something you can actually open and check on your phone — a clean, organized app with your itinerary, every cost in one place, the park fees, your notes, the photo, and even the things only the voice memo captured. You'd have one link to tap instead of digging through files. Want me to build it?"]}]}

args.query: Describe this photo in detail — what is shown, where it appears to be, and any notable details. Keep it concise.
